assignments.title: ABC256E Takahashi's Anguish
assignments.reason: 函数图每节点一条出边，拓扑排序找环，每环取最小C累加

assignments.title: ABC256Ex I like Query Problem
assignments.reason: 分块维护区间整除（均摊：每块均一化后只需 O(√N) 迭代）

assignments.title: ABC256F Cumulative^3 Sum
assignments.reason: 三重前缀和关系：D_x = Σ(j=1..x) (x-j+1)(x-j+2)/2 * A_j，BIT单点更新

assignments.title: ABC256G Black and White Stones
assignments.reason: Burnside引理：对称方案数 = 旋转等价类 + 矩阵快速幂求 k 步方案数

assignments.title: ABC257A A to Z String 2
assignments.reason: 字符 = char('A' + (X-1)/N)

assignments.title: ABC257B 1D Pawn
assignments.reason: 一维数组维护棋子位置，逐次模拟

assignments.title: ABC257C Robot Takahashi
assignments.reason: 排序后枚举阈值 X，前缀和统计准确判断数

assignments.title: ABC257D Jumping Takahashi 2
assignments.reason: 二分 S，建图后 Dijkstra / Floyd 验证全图可达

assignments.title: ABC257E Addition and Multiplication 2
assignments.reason: 贪心：先定最大位数 = N/min(C_i)，再逐位从大到小选数字

assignments.title: ABC257Ex Dice Sum 2
assignments.reason: 骰子掷和计数 DP + 容斥

assignments.title: ABC257F Teleporter Setting
assignments.reason: 双向 Dijkstra：固定图中先跑 d1,dN，再枚举每个 i 加未知边求最短路

assignments.title: ABC257G Prefix Concatenation
assignments.reason: Z函数求 S 各前缀在 T 的对应位置，再 DP 求最小前缀拼接数

assignments.title: ABC258A When?
assignments.reason: 21*60+K 总分钟转 HH:MM，printf("%02d:%02d")

assignments.title: ABC258B Number Box
assignments.reason: 枚举8方向×N×N起点，取模绕行 N 步拼最大数

assignments.title: ABC258C Rotation
assignments.reason: 累加 offset，查询 2 x 时取 S[(x-1+offset)%N]

assignments.title: ABC258D Trophy
assignments.reason: 枚举最终停在第 i 关：preA[i] + (X-i)*B[i]，前缀和辅助

assignments.title: ABC258E Packing Potatoes
assignments.reason: 倍增：预处理每次满箱跨周期的倍增跳跃

assignments.title: ABC258Ex Odd Steps
assignments.reason: 矩阵快速幂加速 DP 转移：禁止前缀和恰好落在特定点

assignments.title: ABC258F Main Street
assignments.reason: Dijkstra on virtual graph：主干道连接各整数网格块

assignments.title: ABC258G Triangle
assignments.reason: 邻接矩阵 O(N^3) 三元组枚举三角形（N 小）

assignments.title: ABC259A Growth Record
assignments.reason: min(M,X)*D + (T - min(N,X)*D) 条件计算

assignments.title: ABC259B Counterclockwise Rotation
assignments.reason: cos/sin 数学函数旋转公式

assignments.title: ABC259C XX to XXX
assignments.reason: 双指针比较两串各连续块的字符和个数（S块数≤T块数且字符一致）

assignments.title: ABC259D Circumferences
assignments.reason: 并查集：起点/终点加入同圆即可达，圆与圆相交则合并

assignments.title: ABC259E LCM on Whiteboard
assignments.reason: 质因数分解：每个素数看是否唯一决定最大幂次

assignments.title: ABC259Ex Yet Another Path Counting
assignments.reason: 对角线分治 + 计数DP：相同标签的起终点对数

assignments.title: ABC259F Select Edges
assignments.reason: 树形DP：以度数 d_i 为约束的树边最大权值选取

assignments.title: ABC259G Grid Card Game
assignments.reason: 选行/列最大化收益 = 最小割：负格子不能同时选行列

assignments.title: ABC260B Better Students
assignments.reason: 结构体排序三轮：按数学分→英语分→总分，带编号优先

assignments.title: ABC260C Changing Jewels
assignments.reason: 线性递推 DP：每级红转为红(n-1)+X蓝(n)，蓝(n)转为红(n-1)+Y蓝(n-1)
